series_metadata.series_title: Referrals by the Division to Prosecutors - cemetery related
series_metadata.series_description: This retention schedule consists of, but is not limited to, correspondence or records sent by the Division to prosecutors or local law enforcement. These records will include confidential information such as attorney work product or attorney client communication.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Records maintained in paper form shall be maintained four years from date referral was sent by Division. ; Electronic: any records maintained in machine readable format, records shall be maintained four years from date referral was sent by Division. ; Microform: any records maintained in microform, records shall be maintained four years from date referral was sent by Division
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase ; Microform: Shred
